title: Council Chamber (disambiguation)
content:
'''Council Chamber''' could refer to:
*[[Tower of First Knowledge/Legends|First Knowledge Council Chamber]]—Where the [[Council of First Knowledge/Legends|Council of First Knowledge]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] convened in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].
*[[Council Chamber (Imperial Palace)|Council Chamber]]—Where the [[New Republic Ruling Council]] convened in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]].
*[[High Board Room/Legends|Gungan Council Chamber of Judgement]]—A bubble-chamber in [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]], from which the [[Gungan High Council/Legends|Gungan High Council]] ruled the city.
*[[Jedi Council Chamber/Legends|High Council Chamber]]—Where the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] convened in the Jedi Temple.
*[[Reassignment Council Tower/Legends|Reassignment Council Chamber]]—Where the [[Council of Reassignment/Legends|Council of Reassignment]] convened in the Jedi Temple.
*[[Tower of Reconciliation/Legends|Reconciliation Council Chamber]]—Where the [[Council of Reconciliation/Legends|Council of Reconciliation]] convened in te Jedi Temple.
*[[Council Chamber (Indu San)|Council Chamber]]—A chamber within the [[Council Hall]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]].
*The [[Council Chamber (Hidden Temple)|Council Chamber]] of the [[Hidden Temple (Sith–Imperial War)|Hidden Jedi Temple]] on [[Taivas]].

{{Disambig}}
{{Interlang
|ja=評議会室
}}
